name: development-skills
description: Dev workflow automation, hooks, and notifications for Gitea-hosted homelab repos.

plugins.name: sound-notifications
plugins.description: Plays system sounds when Claude needs input or finishes a task. Cross-platform: Termux, WSL, macOS, Linux.

plugins.name: productivity-hooks
plugins.description: Injects project context on every prompt, enforces AGENTS.md in subagents, sends Discord notifications on session end.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Gitea dev workflow skills — implement issues, review PRs, merge, triage, deploy.

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Planning pipeline — analyze ideas, create project plans, generate Gitea issues.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Session and workspace management — setup, status, session tracking.

plugins.name: dev-workflow-hooks
plugins.description: Injects development workflow context: project map, infrastructure reference, Gitea coordination reminders, and subagent coding rules.
